categories.product: Product management, requirements, story, and scope components
categories.security: Security review, threat analysis, vulnerability, and secure-default components
categories.revenue: Marketing, sales, growth, customer success, trust, and revenue analytics components
categories.operations: CEO, customer support, product strategy, compliance, talent, finance, supply chain, R&D, crisis, partnership, and knowledge management components
categories.technical: Deep-tech R&D, hardware/software co-design, embedded firmware, FPGA/ASIC, automotive protocols, VAPT, HIL/SIL, compliance, EMC, SBOM, signing, and release components
categories.investor: Investor narrative, funding simulation, PR/media, LinkedIn thought leadership, analyst relations, events, social proof, crisis-to-opportunity, and investor metrics components

subagents.name: ContextScout
subagents.description: Get accurate context FIRST before diving deep—save time, energy, and avoid rework. ContextScout intelligently discovers and retrieves the exact context files you need with precise file paths and line ranges, so you start with the right information instead of guessing. Optimized for multi-model compatibility (Claude, Gemini, GPT-4) with 20% token reduction.

subagents.name: ExternalScout
subagents.description: Fetches live, version-specific documentation for external libraries and frameworks using Context7 and other sources. Optimized with 42% token reduction and enhanced references to prompt engineering and context system docs.

config.name: Agent Metadata

essential.name: Essential (Minimal)
essential.description: Minimal starter kit - universal agent with core subagents. Great for learning the system or lightweight tasks. Upgrade to Developer or Business for full features.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Complete software development environment with code generation, testing, review, and build tools. Includes UI/UX patterns, development principles, and design systems. Use OpenAgent for general tasks (1-4 files) or OpenCoder for complex architecture (4+ files). Recommended for most developers.

business.name: Business
business.description: Business process automation, content creation, and visual workflows. Includes image generation, notifications, and documentation tools.

full.name: Full
full.description: Everything included - all agents, subagents, tools, and plugins for maximum functionality. Includes UI/UX patterns, development principles, and design systems.

advanced.name: Advanced (Meta-Level)
advanced.description: Full installation plus System Builder for creating custom AI architectures. Includes comprehensive context system, system builder templates, and repository management tools. For power users and contributors.

simple-responder.name: Simple Responder
simple-responder.description: Test agent that responds with AWESOME TESTING
